CVE-2024-55577.title: Stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in Linux Ratfor  ...
CVE-2024-55577.description: Stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists in Linux Ratfor 1.06 and earlier. When the software processes a file which is specially crafted by an attacker, arbitrary code may be executed. As a result, the attacker may obtain or alter information of the user environment or cause the user environment to become unusable.
